description_long: This is an adult woman dressed in casual, rugged attire suitable for outdoor or manual work. She wears a tied-up checkered shirt with rolled sleeves, exposing her midriff, and a pair of distressed jeans with a tool belt slung around her waist. Her hands are gloved, and she sports sturdy work boots, suggesting readiness for physical tasks. A baseball cap covers her head, and her hair is pulled back into a ponytail. She also wears a bracelet and a wristwatch, adding subtle personal details. The overall appearance is that of a practical, active individual, likely engaged in urban or semi-rural labor.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in rugged workwear, including a tied shirt, jeans, gloves, boots, and a cap, with a tool belt and ponytail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ponytail, cap, rolled-up sleeves, and tool belt details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tied shirt, exposed midriff, gloves, and facial features under the cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tool belt, bracelet, and glove details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the ponytail, back of the shirt, jeans, and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tied checkered shirt, distressed jeans, work gloves, tool belt, baseball cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent forward
